name: COSMOS-CQA Public Data Candidate - DESI Legacy Imaging Surveys Cutouts
license: Research-only public use in COSMOS-CQA; upstream public data services retain their own terms and citation expectations.

tiles.review_prompt: Candidate public-source reference for inspecting coadd/model/residual cutout context. Treat observations as research workflow notes only; no truth label or validated scientific interpretation is provided.

image_refs.source: DESI Legacy Imaging Surveys Sky Viewer
image_refs.citation: DESI Legacy Imaging Surveys public cutout service and DR6 documentation.
image_refs.access_policy: External public reference URL only; not required for hosted demo execution.
image_refs.notes: Do not make the hosted demo depend on this third-party endpoint until CORS, rate limits, cache policy, attribution, and redistribution terms are reviewed.

image_refs.access_policy: External public reference URL only; not required for hosted demo execution.

provenance.source: DESI Legacy Imaging Surveys public cutout reference
provenance.notes: Candidate manifest for future public-data credibility work. The hosted demo does not fetch these external images by default.
